message.content:
Search the CollabSpace frontend project at D:\project\pt-gitlab\collabspace\collabspace-web for code related to mirror document copying and the target space station selection dialog.

Search for these keywords in TSX/TS files:
- "mirror" / "Mirror"
- "copyNode" / "CopyNode"
- "外网" / "镜像"
- "targetStation" / "目标空间站"
- "copyToInternal" / "copyMirror"
- "batch" in copy-related contexts

For each relevant file found, provide:
1. Full file path
2. Key component/function names
3. Brief summary of what the code does

I need to understand the frontend flow for the mirror copy feature, especially the dialog that lets users select a target space station.

content.text: I'll search for these keywords in parallel across the frontend codebase.

content.text:
Now I have a thorough understanding of the entire mirror copy flow. Let me compile the complete findings.

---

Here is a full map of the mirror document copying feature and the target space station selection dialog in the CollabSpace frontend.

---

## Feature Overview

The "mirror copy" feature in CollabSpace allows users on the "external network mirror" (`isPrivateMirror`) deployment to copy documents from the mirror (read-only) environment into an internal (private) space station. There are two flavors: single-node copy and batch multi-source copy.

---

## Key Files and Their Roles

### 1. Environment Flag
**`D:\project\pt-gitlab\collabspace\collabspace-web\packages\web\common\constants.ts`**

Defines `isPrivateMirror` — the boolean that gates the entire copy-to-private feature. It is `true` when the origin URL contains `-mirror` or `-test-private`.

```ts
export const isPrivateMirror = forceOrigin !== '-test-private' && (origin.includes('-mirror') || origin.includes('-test-private'));
```

All copy-to-private UI is conditionally rendered based on this flag.

---

### 2. API Layer
**`D:\project\pt-gitlab\collabspace\collabspace-web\packages\web\common\api\node.ts`**

Contains all migration-related API calls:

| Function | Endpoint | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `getManagedSpacesForMigration()` | `GET /api/v1/spaceNode/migration/managedSpaces` | Fetches the list of internal spaces the user can migrate into |
| `createMigrationTask(data, spaceId)` | `POST /api/v1/spaceNode/migration/createMigrationTask` | Creates a single-node migration task (mirror -> private) |
| `getMigrationTask(taskId, spaceId)` | `GET /api/v1/spaceNode/migration/task/{taskId}` | Polls task status (status 2 = done, status 3 = error) |
| `createBatchMigrationTask(data)` | `POST /api/v1/spaceNode/migration/createBatchMigrationTask` | Creates a multi-source/multi-node batch migration task |
| `getBatchMigrationProgress(batchId)` | `GET /api/v1/spaceNode/migration/batch/{batchId}` | Polls batch task progress |
| `copyShareToSpaceAPI(nodeIds, spaceId, shareId)` | `POST /api/v1/spaceNode/migration/copyShareFile` | Copies a shared document into a space (used from share pages) |

---

### 3. RTK Query — Space List
**`D:\project\pt-gitlab\collabspace\collabspace-web\packages\web\store\query\space.ts`**

- **`useGetManagedSpacesForMigrationQuery`** — wraps `GET /api/v1/spaceNode/migration/managedSpaces`. Used by both the single-node modal and the batch migration page to populate the target space station list.

---

### 4. Single-Node Copy Dialog (the target space station selection modal)
**`D:\project\pt-gitlab\collabspace\collabspace-web\packages\web\components\SpaceNodeMigrateModal\index.tsx`**

This is the primary target space station selection dialog for single-node copy.

- **`useSpaceNodeMigrateModal()`** — custom hook that returns a `modal` ReactNode and an `open(nodeIds: string[])` function.
- **`SpaceNodeMigrateModalContent`** — the inner component. Shows a `Radio.Group` listing all managed internal spaces (from `useGetManagedSpacesForMigrationQuery`). On confirm, calls `createMigrationTask` then polls `getMigrationTask` every 2 seconds until status is 2 (success) or 3 (error).
- Modal title key: `targetSpace` = "目标空间站"

Flow:
1. User right-clicks a node on the mirror → clicks "复制文档到内网"
2. `onCopyToPrivate(node)` fires → `openSpaceNodeMigrateModal([node.data.id])`
3. Modal opens showing radio list of internal spaces
4. User selects target space → clicks save → `createMigrationTask` is called → polling begins

---

### 5. Right-Click Menu (context menu)
**`D:\project\pt-gitlab\collabspace\collabspace-web\packages\web\components\SpaceNodeContextMenu\SpaceNodeContextMenu.tsx`**

- **`SpaceNodeContextMenuBase`** — when `isPrivateMirror` is true, the entire context menu collapses to only show "复制文档到内网" (and download if applicable). The `onCopyToPrivate` prop receives the node and triggers the modal.
- Accepts `onCopyToPrivate?: (node: ISpaceTreeNode) => void` as a prop.

---

### 6. Wiring — Node Tree (workbench)
**`D:\project\pt-gitlab\collabspace\collabspace-web\packages\web\pages\aio\workbench\node-tree\NodeTree.tsx`**

- Instantiates `useSpaceNodeMigrateModal()`.
- Renders a **"批量复制文档到内网"** button in the header (only on mirror) that calls `openSpaceNodeMigrateModal([...selectedSpaceNodeIds])` — i.e., opens the same single-node modal but passes multiple selected node IDs.
- Passes `onCopyToPrivate` down to `NodeTable`.

---

### 7. Wiring — Node Table (workbench)
**`D:\project\pt-gitlab\collabspace\collabspace-web\packages\web\pages\aio\workbench\node-tree\NodeTable.tsx`**

- Instantiates `useSpaceNodeMigrateModal()` itself for per-row right-click actions.
- `onCopyToPrivate = (node) => openSpaceNodeMigrateModal([node.data.id])` is wired to `SpaceNodeContextMenu` for each table row.

---

### 8. Wiring — Aside Node Tree (view-node page)
**`D:\project\pt-gitlab\collabspace\collabspace-web\packages\web\pages\aio\view-node\AsideSpacesTree\index.tsx`**

- Same pattern: `useSpaceNodeMigrateModal()` + `onCopyToPrivate` passed to `SpaceNodeContextMenu`.

---

### 9. Batch Multi-Source Migration Page (admin backend)
**`D:\project\pt-gitlab\collabspace\collabspace-web\packages\web\pages\user-backend\doc-migration\DocMigration.tsx`**

- **`DocMigration`** — a full-page admin UI for bulk migration across multiple source spaces.
- Left panel: `SpacesTree` with checkbox overlays for selecting source nodes (supports tree-level check/half-check propagation).
- Right panel: `Radio.Group` listing target spaces (disables any space that is also a source).
- "开始转移" (move) and "开始复制" (copy/keep original) buttons call `createBatchMigrationTask`.
- Uses Redux slice `docMigration` to track the active batch task globally.

---

### 10. Batch Progress Tracker
**`D:\project\pt-gitlab\collabspace\collabspace-web\packages\web\pages\user-backend\migration-control\MigrationControl.tsx`**

- **`MigrationControl`** — a persistent floating button + modal that appears when a batch migration is in progress.
- Polls `getBatchMigrationProgress` every 2 seconds, shows a `Progress` bar, and displays errors per sub-task.
- On completion, invalidates RTK Query cache for all affected space IDs.

---

### 11. Redux State for Batch Tasks
**`D:\project\pt-gitlab\collabspace\collabspace-web\packages\web\store\docMigration.ts`**

- Slice `docMigration` with `batchMigrationTask: IBatchMigrationTask | null`.
- Actions: `dispatchAddBatchMigrationTask` / `dispatchDelBatchMigrationTask`.

---

### 12. Share-Page Copy Dialog
**`D:\project\pt-gitlab\collabspace\collabspace-web\packages\web\pages\share\CopyToSpace.tsx`**

- **`CopyToSpaceModal`** — imperative modal (via `useImperativeHandle`) for copying a shared document into a space station.
- Uses `Checkbox` instead of `Radio` for space selection (but enforces single selection via toggling).
- Calls `copyShareToSpaceAPI(nodeIds, selectedSpaceId, shareId)`.
- Triggered from share pages, not from the main workbench mirror flow.

---

## Summary of the Full Mirror Copy Flow

```
isPrivateMirror = true
        │
        ├─ Right-click single node
        │       └─ SpaceNodeContextMenu → onCopyToPrivate(node)
        │               └─ useSpaceNodeMigrateModal.open([nodeId])
        │                       └─ SpaceNodeMigrateModalContent
        │                               └─ Radio list (useGetManagedSpacesForMigrationQuery)
        │                               └─ createMigrationTask → poll getMigrationTask
        │
        ├─ Multi-select + "批量复制文档到内网" button (NodeTree header)
        │       └─ useSpaceNodeMigrateModal.open([...selectedIds])
        │               └─ same modal, multiple nodeIds
        │
        └─ Admin backend "文件转移" page (DocMigration)
                └─ SpacesTree with checkboxes (multi-space source)
                └─ Radio for target space
                └─ createBatchMigrationTask → MigrationControl (global progress tracker)
```

The `useGetManagedSpacesForMigrationQuery` / `GET /api/v1/spaceNode/migration/managedSpaces` is the single source of truth for the target space list across all three entry points.
